name: a user configuration extending the standard profile that does not mention a rule leaves it enforced at its recommended severity
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && printf 'name: my
extends:
  - standard
rules:
  some-other-rule: warn
' > ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile ctp.config.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && grep -q 'disabled=0' e.txt && echo config-keeps-unmentioned-enforced 1>&2
